response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK c1
ATTR c1 : varchar : PK
ATTR c2 : varchar
ATTR c3 : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK c4
ATTR c4 : varchar : PK
ATTR c5 : date
ATTR c6 : varchar
ATTR c7 : varchar
ATTR c8 : varchar
ATTR c9 : varchar
ATTR c10 : varchar
ATTR c11 : varchar
ATTR c12 : varchar
ATTR c13 : varchar
ATTR c14 : varchar
ATTR c15 : varchar
ATTR c16 : varchar
ATTR c17 : varchar
ATTR c18 : varchar
ATTR c19 : varchar
ATTR c20 : varchar
ATTR c21 : varchar
ATTR c22 : date
ATTR c23 : time

ENTITY CrewMember
PK c24
ATTR c24 : varchar : PK
ATTR c25 : varchar

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, crew_member_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR crew_member_code : varchar : FK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY PassengerBooking
PK flight_code, passenger_code, seat
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR passenger_code : varchar : FK
ATTR seat : varchar

ENTITY AirportLocation
PK location_code
ATTR location_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=c9
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=c13
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=c7
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=c18
REL Flight -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=c20
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=c11
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_member_code
REL PassengerBooking -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL PassengerBooking -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passenger_code
REL Airport -> AirportLocation : 1 -> 1 : FK=location_code
